# Contributing

Contributions to this package are most welcome!

## Development setup

To get started:

1. Fork the repository, then clone your fork
2. Open `SA.Automate.WeatherApi.slnx` in Visual Studio or Rider
3. Build the solution — `dotnet build`

To test against a real Umbraco site, add a project reference from your local Umbraco site to `src/SA.Automate.WeatherApi/SA.Automate.WeatherApi.csproj`.
